# supervis

> DeepSeek-powered supervisor that drives Claude Code autonomously through software projects. Full TUI with live output, message queuing, and project-aware configuration.

## Docs

* [README](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/README.md) — install, usage, architecture
* [Changelog](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) — version history
* [Full docs (single file)](https://github.com/arikusi/supervis/blob/main/llms-full.txt) — everything in one context-window-friendly file
* [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/supervis/) — package page

## Overview

supervis is a TUI tool that uses DeepSeek V3.2 (with thinking mode) as a supervisor to orchestrate Claude Code. You describe what you want, DeepSeek breaks it into steps, sends each step to Claude Code, and keeps going until the task is complete. Watch Claude work in real time. Type while the agent works. Project-specific instructions via `.supervis/SUPERVIS.md`.

## Quick start

```bash
pipx install supervis
cd myproject
supervis
```

Requires Claude Code CLI and a DeepSeek API key.
